steps.t: Gerebert Took's house is west of Tuckborough, at the end of the road. Esilia has asked you to go to Gerebert Took's house and learn why he is late for…
The inside of Gerebert Took's home is empty and unused. You should search the house for some information that will explain where Gerebert has gone.
Esilia Took can be found near the centre of Tuckborough. As you entered Gerebert Took's bedroom, you spotted a journal on a table on the other side of…
